ui.title: SCF Status of Invoices
ui.desc: Showing Approved / Discounted / Due for Settlement.

data.sql: SELECT C_UNIT_CODE, DOC_STATUS, COUNT(C_MAIN_REF) AS VL FROM (SELECT 'Approved' AS DOC_STATUS, C_MAIN_REF, C_UNIT_CODE  FROM EXIMTRX.INVC_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS='M' AND (FA_REQ_BUYER_APR_FLG='2' OR FA_REQ_BUYER_APR_FLG IS NULL) UNION ALL SELECT 'Discounted' AS DOC_STATUS, C_MAIN_REF, C_UNIT_CODE  FROM EXIMTRX.INVC_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS='M' AND FA_FIN_LOAN_AMT > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Due for Settlement' AS DOC_STATUS, C_MAIN_REF, C_UNIT_CODE  FROM EXIMTRX.INVC_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS='M' AND TRUNC(FA_DOC_DUE_DT) <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND FA_DOC_BAL > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Hit' AS DOC_STATUS, C_MAIN_REF, C_UNIT_CODE  FROM EXIMTRX.INVC_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS='M' AND FA_DOC_STATUS='Hit') GROUP BY C_UNIT_CODE, DOC_STATUS
